creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
For example, I wrote: 

> GitHub users: upvotes, please, to 
> <https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-appservice-irc/issues/208#issuecomment-259469625> 
> and FreeBSD-specific <https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-appservice-irc/issues/208#issuecomment-1136572754>. 
> Thank you.

VimDiesel responded: 

> Title: The official network wishlist for matrix.org / Element · Issue #208 · matrix-org/matrix-appservice-irc · GitHub

– and in the same breath, in response to itself: 

> 208 – ipfw man page gives incorrect path for examples https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208
